snippet.title: Will It Blend? - Diamonds...as far as you know
snippet.description:
Tell us what to blend next here: http://www.facebook.com/willitblend

Listen, we wanted to tell you, we really did. But then we saw the look on your face, and how happy you were, so we thought we'd play along. Then you had to go show off, and brag to all your friends, and there was no turning back. Besides they look just like real diamonds, I mean, they fooled you didn't they?

Check out the blender you see in this video: http://bit.ly/OFbEgD

Google+ - http://gplus.to/blendtec
